title: espania saison 2
description: This is the pack mode for the Spain series on the Minko YouTube channel, So this is for season 2, so if you haven't been able to see season 1, go to my YouTube channel.
body: This is the Spain series pack on my YouTube channel, minko. For my subscribers or friends to join the server, the server link is usually included in the pack. Otherwise, I'll put the IP address right here (espania_V3.aternos.me). The server is called Espania, even though it doesn't really have much to do with Spain. That's because the name came from a joke. The very first episode of this series on my YouTube channel was for a Spanish homework assignment for a friend, and we kept the name. This mod pack will bring you all the mods used in the series, such as food mods for more dishes, building mods for easier drinking and building, and of course, custom wallpapers related to the series, like the images marked in the gallery. There are also car mods, custom blog mods, and supply mods. I hope you like my pack, and good luck!Of course, this mode isn't meant for joining the server used for my YouTube series. But if you want to play a relaxed survival game, thanks to all the available modes, you can create a great modded survival experience with many modes that closely resemble Fuze's modded Minecraft series. So it's a Modern Technological Adventure pack, and of course, two semi-RP modes.
